feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Scope added but nodes are not there for aATP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We have added two scopes (1JW, 6N0) in the CBC server for aATP; however, their corresponding paths/nodes are not appearing in the IMG screen.

Reqeusting you to help us to get the nodes of aATP.

 

Regards,

Tushar

entry.title: Invoice ERROR
entry.content:
Here is the English translation of the SAP error message text:

Diagnosis

If the following conditions are met, invoice line items received multiple times via EDI/SOA can be settled:

  • Goods receipt–based invoice verification is defined for the purchase order line item.

  • The goods receipt number (delivery note number) is included in the IDoc or SOA message.

  • A differential invoice is used and a previous invoice already exists (as the second invoice). In other words, according to the two-line item concept, for each goods receipt line item or purchase order line item, both the current line item (invoice line item) and the line item from the previous invoice (credit memo line item) are displayed.

System Response

If these conditions are not met, posting of the IDoc or SOA message is canceled.

Procedure

Check the IDoc or SOA message. In some cases, the IDoc or SOA message can be edited (for example, if the supplier accidentally sent the wrong purchase order line item). If it cannot be edited, contact the supplier and request that they resend the invoice with corrected data.

Let me know if you need any adjustments to the translation.

entry.title: Valuation of produced material - moving average price
entry.content:
Hello, 
we have the following situation: we are purchasing a trading good which is valuated with moving average price. Sometimes small adaption has to be done. Therefore a bill of material with routing is set up. Speciality: the material number does not change, the material itself is consumed in the production order, but also output of the production order. When we create a production order, the planned price does not include the routing from the bill of material - the system just valuates the ouput of the current moving average price of the input material. Only when the production order is closed the variances also settle to inventory. How can we customize the system, that in case a product with moving average valuation is produced, output of the production order should be valuated with the total planned costs and not with the actual moving averape price?

Best regards
Anja

entry.title: Can MRP prioritize one BOM alternative component and fall back to another based on availability?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question regarding SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and the behavior of MRP with alternative components in production.

Let’s say I have:

  • Product A as the finished product

  • Raw Material B as the main/preferred component

  • Raw Material C as an alternative component that can also be used to produce Product A

My business requirement is the following:

When MRP runs for Product A, I want the system to first consider Raw Material B as the priority component. If B is not available in stock, then I want the system to recommend using Raw Material C instead.

So the expected logic would be something like:

  • Use B first

  • If B is unavailable, then propose C as the alternative

My understanding so far is that in standard SAP Public Cloud, alternative items in the BOM can be maintained with priority, but MRP itself may not behave as a true fallback logic during planning. It seems the alternative can be handled later at the production order/component level rather than directly in the MRP recommendation.

Could you please confirm the following:

  1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, can MRP itself recommend the alternative component automatically based on stock availability?

  2. Or is this only handled later by the planner in the production order?

  3. If standard MRP does not support this exact fallback behavior, what is the best-practice approach in Public Cloud?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Clarification on Missing Attachments in Singapore GST Return Report
entry.content:
The system did not create any attachment for line items for Singapore GST return report in Run Statutory Reports app.

In Plan Customer Projects App, we need to restrict the user to only add the customer reference number and in the billing tab. User can open the billing due date, but they must not have any other editing option.

Why is the account assignment type field appears blank in the resulting journal entry after posting the goods receipt?

entry.title: Approval workflow for Vendor, Customer and Material Master in SAP Public Cloud 2602
entry.content:
Requirement:
We request guidance and feasibility confirmation for implementing an automated Customer, Vendor and Material Master upload process with a Maker–Checker authorization mechanism in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Business Scenario:
Customer, Vendor and Material Master data should be uploaded automatically (e.g., via file upload or interface). The uploaded data must go through a Maker–Checker (Create and Approve) workflow, where:

  • The Maker uploads or creates the master data

  • The Checker reviews and approves the data

  • Only approved data is posted to the system

Support Required:
Please advise on:

  1. Whether this scenario is supported in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

  2. Relevant standard functionality, Fiori apps, or SSCUI configurations

  3. Use of SAP workflow, APIs, or extensibility options to enable this requirement

  4. Known limitations or recommended best practices

Kindly provide guidance on feasibility and next steps.

 

Regards,
Tushar Sonawane

entry.title: Posting journal entries with synchronous API for non leading ledgers
entry.content:
Hello, we are having an issue in providing the ledger group for Journal Entry posting while using the API linked below, which is the journal entry post synchronous API.  I would like to know if there is a way to define an accounting principle while posting a Journal Entry using the post synchronous API instead of using the asynchronous API, due to architectural constraints. That way we can post directly to a specified ledger instead of the leading one while still maintaining a synchronous architecture.

Thank you.

Link to documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/f5c8d0579212c525e100000…

entry.title: Sales Outbound Delivery Using EWM In SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please provide the configuration step by step how to map the Sales Outbound delivery via EWM in SAP Public cloud.

Also, in case of Delivery reverse how to reverse the Sales delivery in SAP Public Cloud, please provide the steps.

It helps a lot.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: 1ZQ stock migration
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are using scope item 1ZQ, and we want to migrate stock to an external WMS.

We tried to used the migration template "Material Inventory Balance" but we have an error message M7 491 "Inventory Balance Migration into WM/EWM storage location & is not possible"

We found the following SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002789369 that indicates "Check the configuration environment of the WM/EWM storage location."

Can you give us more details about what to check in the configuration environment ?

Thanks in advance for your help.

Eric

entry.title: Subscription Billing / Data Migration from ECC
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Hello @CarstenJ 

i hope this question is not to redundand, as i have found some other questions about Data Migration to Subscription Billing.

I have a scenario where recurring billing for products is curently done with Rental-contracts and Billing Plans in SAP ECC.
The goal is now to transition to SAP Public Cloud and use Subscription Billing.

My question is, what is the best way to move all these legacy "subscriptions" to Subscription Billing ?

From my research the most practial way would be to transform the legacy data to fit the new system and use the Subscription API, as there are no Migration Objects in SAP Public Cloud or other options for a migration.

Im thankfull for any tips or experiences, that could help with this.

Best regards 
Lukas

entry.title: STO Billing (JSTO) Not Picking Price from Stock / Goods Issue
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in Stock Transfer Order (STO) within the same company code process.
Process Flow:
STO created using ME21N with document type UD
Outbound Delivery created via VL10B
Post Goods Issue (PGI) completed
Billing document created using JSTO billing type
Issue:
While creating the STO invoice, the price is showing as zero in the billing document.
Expected Behavior:
The system should pick the valuation price / stock price based on the Goods Issue (PGI) value from the outbound delivery.
Current Workaround:
Maintaining condition records manually to derive pricing in billing
Clarification Required:
Is there any standard configuration or setting to make the billing document pick:
Price from material valuation (stock value) OR
Price from PGI accounting document / goods issue value

entry.title: Create Product Variant from Sales Order - maintaining additional fields
entry.content:
We try to create a Product Variant from a Sales Order and want to prepopulate specific fields / make certain links, in particular:

  • assign super routing to Product Variant
  • assign super BOM to Product Variant
  • automatic creation of Production Version for the configured Product Variant
  • fill in additional fields of the Product Variant
  • fill in additional fields of Production Version

We identified the BadIs

  • BD_LO_VCHCLF_VCH_SD_VAR_COPY
  • BD_LO_VCHCLF_VCH_SD_VAR_DATA

Unfortunately, we could not manage to accomplish the described functionality with these Badis.

Is this possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

How can we handle this during the process “Create Product Variant” as an automated process?

entry.title: Consolidation field from Group Reporting is unavailable in App: Display Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
In Private Cloud, The T-Code: FAGLL03H has consolidation fields available to select for layout display. However, In Public Cloud, we expected The App: F2217 - Display Line Items in General Ledger which contains all fields from ACDOCA should also has consolidation fields available to be selected but turned out it doesn't.

Please kindly suggest the other available report app which can display group reporting data in FI Line item report.

Example of required fields to be display:

  • Consolidation Unit
  • Company
  • Consolidation Chart of Account
  • Consolidation financial Statement Item
  • Consolidation subitem category
  • Consolidation subitem

entry.title: YCOA G/L Account Automatic Posting Assignment Documentation for COGS and Inventory Accounts
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
I'm working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation and need to understand the automatic posting logic for G/L accounts in the standard chart of accounts YCOA, particularly for COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) and inventory-related accounts.
What I'm looking for:

 

Comprehensive documentation or mapping that shows which automatic posting transactions (e.g., GBB - Goods Issue, WRX - Goods Receipt, etc.) are linked to each YCOA G/L account
Specifically for accounts in the 50x/51x/52x/54x/55x/59x ranges (COGS, consumption, variances, inventory changes)

 

Example accounts I need clarification on:

 

50100000 - COGS Raw Mat w/o CE
50150000 - COGS Packmat w/o CE
50200000 - COGS Trade
50300000 - COGS SF&F w/o CE
50301000 - COGS Direct Material
50302000 - COGS Third Party
50303000 - COGS Material Overhd
50304000 - COGS Personnel Time
50305000 - COGS Machine Time
50306000 - COGS Setup Time
50307000 - COGS Productn Overhd
50308000 - COGS Credit Co/By-Pr
50309000 - COGS - Hardware
50309500 - COGS - Licenses
51100000 - Consptn Raw Mat
51500000 - Consptn Packag Mat
51600000 - Consptn Trde Gds
51700000 - Consptn Repair Mat
51900000 - Consptn Subct.w/o CE
51950000 - Consptn Subcontr
52001000 through 52590000 - Various inventory variances, price differences, and adjustments
54011000 through 54444000 - Inventory changes and reserves
55100000, 55110000 - Production order adjustments
59801000, 59900000 - Adjustments and affiliated COGS

 

My specific questions:

 

Is there a consolidated reference document or SAP Help article that maps YCOA accounts to their corresponding automatic posting keys?
For COGS accounts (501xxxxx, 503xxxxx), which specific business transactions trigger postings? (e.g., goods issue for sales order, consumption posting, production order settlement, etc.)
For variance and price difference accounts (520xxxxx, 525xxxxx), what are the exact conditions that cause automatic postings?
Are there any Best Practice configuration guides that explain the intended use case for each account in YCOA?

 

I've reviewed the standard SAP Help Portal documentation for Financial Accounting but couldn't find a comprehensive mapping. Any guidance, links to official documentation, or practical insights from implementation experience would be greatly appreciated.
System details:

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Chart of Accounts: YCOA
Focus area: Financial Accounting (FI), Material Ledger integration

 

Thank you in advance for your help!
Best regards,

entry.content:
Hi  team 

my client need customer down payment request workflow approval process, kindly let us know it available or not in our system.it emergency

 v b mohan krishna

entry.title: When awarding the supplier quotation to PO, the interface displays the "Manage Purchase Orders".
entry.content:
When awarding the supplier quotation to PO, the interface has the manage purchase orders view. I need to maintain PO header conditions therefore i need to know how i can open the po creation from advanced mode?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Retrieve value from QR code via RF in EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Our pallet labels are placed from our vendors under a common format. There are several information that we would like to be able to retrieve in the RF transactions in our embedded warehouse management system. For the handling unit identification we are storing the box id on field External identification 2 of the handling units. We would like to be able to scan the QR code of the label and retrieve only the part that corresponds the the Box no and search for the handling unit number based on the external identification 2 value.

Is there an enhancement in RF transactions that provides this functionality?

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Go to RF menu SAP . Select any RF transaction with HU (like create and confirm adhoc HU WT) and scan QR code with multiple information. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
